channel.title: DeerFlow on Charlotte's AI Lab
channel.description: Recent content in DeerFlow on Charlotte's AI Lab

item.title: ByteDance Just Open-Sourced a 'Super Agent' — 35,000 GitHub Stars Overnight
item.description: ByteDance open-sourced DeerFlow 2.0, a framework that lets multiple AIs work together like a team. 35,000 GitHub stars in one night — what’s the big deal, and can regular people use it?
